title: article — one candidate paper from a retrieval run
description: Arrives as status=candidate from tools/fetch_pubmed.py; screening (skills/screening.md) moves it to included or excluded, always with a filter_reason (OVERVIEW rule 2). Included articles get a summary before they can appear in an issue.

pub_date.description: As given by PubMed — may be year-month or a full date.

authors.description: First author et al. — display form.

filter_reason.description: Why this article was included or excluded — required once status leaves candidate (enforced in validate.py).

summary.description: Plain-language summary for the newsletter — included articles only.
